LanguageData.VCE_ElectricHauteSection.description: An electrically-powered state-of-the-art culinary station, designed for precision cooking and artful meal presentation.
LanguageData.VCE_ElectricHauteSection.label: electric haute section
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.description: An opulent symphony of flavor and form, where the finest ingredients and masterful technique unite in a transcendent culinary masterpiece. Provides exquisite mood when eaten, and ensures that colonists eating it together will form strong opinions of each other.
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.label: haute meal
